domain_gate.evidence: {"summary": {"H_gated_budget_confirm": {"value": 0.225, "threshold": 0.2, "pass": true}, "H_gated_vs_prefill_confirm": {"value": 0.025, "threshold": 0.15, "pass": false}}, "per_seed": {"s42": {"gated_lift": 0.4, "prefill_lift": 0.2, "advantage": 0.2, "entropy_delta": -0.1268}, "s123": {"gated_lift": 0.35, "prefill_lift": 0.225, "advantage": 0.125, "entropy_delta": 0.077}, "s777": {"gated_lift": 0.225, "prefill_lift": 0.2, "advantage": 0.025, "entropy_delta": 0.3184}}, "note": "SPLIT: core budget-feasibility claim CONFIRMS 3/3 seeds; the >=0.15 advantage-over-prefill margin confirms only at seed 42 (0.20/0.12/0.03) - treat the advantage as ~0.1 and underpowered at n=40/seed. seed-42 run reused from gate_L4b (identical registered config, deterministic; disclosed). tau_fixed=1.845 as registered in e4b (greedy-derived - consistent with the claim being confirmed, noted)."}
